message:
feat(conformance): CDDL datagram envelope docs + vecgen zone/mesh schemas

Add FCPS datagram envelope wire format documentation to FCP_CDDL_V2.cddl
with MAC computation details and size constraints.

Register 3 new schemas in vecgen core_schema_registrations:
- fcp.zone:ZoneKeyManifest@1.0.0
- fcp.zone:ZoneDefinition@1.0.0
- fcp.mesh:GossipSummary@1.0.0

All 16 schema hash determinism tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -209,6 +209,24 @@ sanitizer_receipt = {
   ? signature: bstr
 }
 
+; ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+; FCPS Datagram Envelope (binary, NOT CBOR)
+; ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
+;
+; Wire format (40-byte header + variable payload):
+;   session_id:  bstr .size 16    ; bytes 0-15
+;   seq:         uint .size 8     ; bytes 16-23  (u64 LE)
+;   mac:         bstr .size 16    ; bytes 24-39  (truncated HMAC-SHA256 or BLAKE3)
+;   frame_bytes: bstr             ; bytes 40+    (FCPS frame payload, may be empty)
+;
+; MAC input = session_id || direction_byte || seq_le || frame_bytes
+;   Suite1: HMAC-SHA256(mac_key, mac_input)[0..16]
+;   Suite2: BLAKE3_keyed(mac_key, mac_input)[0..16]
+;
+; Constraints:
+;   - Total length >= 40 (FCPS_DATAGRAM_HEADER_LEN)
+;   - Total length <= max_datagram_bytes (default 1200)
+
 ; ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 ; Session Handshake (CBOR)
 ; ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

@@ -241,6 +241,24 @@ pub fn core_schema_registrations() -> Vec<SchemaRegistration> {
             Version::new(1, 1, 0),
             "Streaming event wrapper",
         ),
+        SchemaRegistration::new(
+            "fcp.zone",
+            "ZoneKeyManifest",
+            Version::new(1, 0, 0),
+            "Zone key distribution manifest",
+        ),
+        SchemaRegistration::new(
+            "fcp.zone",
+            "ZoneDefinition",
+            Version::new(1, 0, 0),
+            "Zone configuration and membership",
+        ),
+        SchemaRegistration::new(
+            "fcp.mesh",
+            "GossipSummary",
+            Version::new(1, 0, 0),
+            "Mesh gossip protocol summary",
+        ),
     ]
 }
